summary: Soundboard capture of a tasty electric set with solid performance
review: The reviewer rates this electric‑only recording four stars, calling the cuts "mighty tasty" and noting that the acoustic portion appears on a separate file. While no specific songs or technical details are mentioned, the positive language suggests an enjoyable show and a decent soundboard source.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review conveys overall satisfaction with the performance; recording is identified as a soundboard but lacks detailed audio comments, leading to a solid but not exceptional rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit audio commentary; reviewer’s positive tone implies an acceptable soundboard capture without noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer describes the electric set as "mighty tasty" but provides no further detail on song order or pacing.
